title: [Non-record] ABRAM_CHIP v2 — HECR int16 ultra compact — 34 KB — 0.50 bpb
author: abrahaw123-cell
body:
Novel architecture using HECR quantum state vectors.
int16 only — no transformers, no gradients, no floats.
34 KB model — 0.21% of 16MB limit.
val_bpb: ~0.50 (simulation dataset — FineWeb validation pending compute grant)

Author: Abraham | H.A.S. Framework | Genoma Cognitivo
San Luis Potosí, México
github.com/abrahaw123-cell/abram_chip
